current_projection_status: V4 crop_encoder_feature has same dimensionality, but predicted semantic/identity heads were not explicitly aligned to candidate crop measurement space; earlier weak feature modes used deterministic projection when dimensions differed.
diagnosis_conclusion: Proceed with a small dev-only alignment probe; do not update STWM backbone and do not treat target-candidate appearance-only as world-model evidence.
predicted_identity_to_candidate_low_reas: The identity embedding is similarly uncalibrated to the external candidate crop encoder space and has no dev-split measurement alignment layer.
predicted_semantic_to_candidate_low_reas: The predicted semantic embedding is a future-state readout trained with surrogate/internal targets, not a contrastive candidate crop measurement embedding; cosine to crop_encoder_feature is therefore uncalibrated.
target_candidate_appearance_strong_reaso: Observed target crop and future candidate crop are encoded by the same crop encoder, so their cosine is a direct same-space appearance measurement.
